name: the-5-to-9
description: Night-shift crew skills for Codex: the shift protocol, beads-backed memory, and crew model right-sizing. The portable core of The 5 to 9. NOTE: skills/ here is a byte-for-byte copy of the repo's canonical skills/ (Codex copies only this subdir on install, so skills must live inside it). Keep in sync — the gate enforces it: `rm -rf .agents/plugins/the-5-to-9/skills && cp -R skills .agents/plugins/the-5-to-9/skills`.

interface.shortDescription: The shift that works while you're off the clock.
